name: Spring Vegetable Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Heat olive oil plus 3 tablespoons water in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Add the carrots and cauliflower; sauté, covered, until crisp-tender.
4. Lift the lid and stir occasionally until cooked through.
5. Stir in the scallions and sauté for another minute, just until slightly limp.
6. Stir in peas and parsley; remove from heat.
7. In a mixing bowl, combine beaten eggs with milk, feta, and thyme.
8. Stir in the skillet mixture and add pepper to taste.
9. Oil a 10-inch tart pan.
10. Line the bottom with half the bread crumbs.
11. Pour the vegetable mixture into the center of the crust.
12. Top with remaining bread crumbs.
13. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until set and top is golden brown.
14. Let stand for 10 minutes before cutting.
